Zinzino Group's Q1 revenue up by 60%, March sales increased by 79% to SEK 268.0 million. Faun Pharma saw sales decline.
news.summary: In April 3, 2025, in Gothenburg, Sweden, it was reported that Zinzino group experienced a significant surge in revenue during Q1, with a remarkable 60% increase compared to the previous year. Specifically in March, the revenue from Zinzino's sales markets saw a substantial rise of 79%, reaching SEK 268.0 million, up from SEK 149.7 million. However, during the same period, Faun Pharma faced a decline in external sales.

news.headline: CoinEx to attend Paris Blockchain Week 2025 in France from April 8-10, strengthening presence in Europe. #Cryptocurrency #Blockchain #CoinEx #ParisBlockchainWeek
news.summary: On April 3, 2025, CoinEx, an international cryptocurrency exchange, announced its participation in Paris Blockchain Week (PBW) 2025, scheduled from April 8 to April 10 in Paris, France. PBW is renowned in Europe as a significant blockchain gathering. CoinEx's involvement showcases its engagement in the event, seeking to tap into the opportunities presented by this esteemed platform.

news.headline: Japan is unable to retaliate against Trump's tariffs due to its struggling economy. Analysts suggest no feasible options.
news.summary: In response to U.S. tariffs, Japan has avoided discussing retaliatory measures. According to trade analysts, this restraint is due to the country's economy facing inflation pressures, which restricts its possible courses of action.

Alabama and Minnesota lawmakers push for Bitcoin reserves with identical bills. 26 US states introduce Bitcoin reserve bills; Arizona leads the race.
news.summary: Lawmakers in Minnesota and Alabama have filed companion bills that allow each state to invest in Bitcoin. The Minnesota Bitcoin Act, introduced by Rep. Bernie Perryman, and Alabama's Senate Bill 283 and House Bill 482 introduced by Sen. Will Barfoot and Rep. Mike Shaw, respectively, aim to invest state assets in crypto, primarily Bitcoin. The Minnesota bill exempts crypto gains from state income taxes and allows residents to pay state fees with Bitcoin. The Alabama bills, although not explicitly mentioning Bitcoin, require investments in assets with a market value of $750 billion, which currently only Bitcoin meets. 26 US states have introduced bills to create Bitcoin reserves, with Arizona closest to passing a law. Pennsylvania initially introduced such bill in 2004 but was rejected, with similar initiatives also failing in Montana, North Dakota, South Dakota, and Wyoming. Political confrontations may have hindered progress in some states.

news.headline: Matrox Video and intoPIX collaborate on IPMX & ST 2110 tech at NAB 2025 with JPEG XS, including Matrox Vion 4K IP video gateway.
news.summary: A company known as intoPIX, specializing in high-performance video compression, is strengthening its collaboration with Matrox Video to advance ST 2110 and IPMX workflows. They are set to demonstrate innovative interoperable solutions at NAB 2025, leveraging JPEG XS compression technology for streamlined IP video transport. Matrox Video will introduce the Matrox Vion 4K IP video gateway at the event, featuring support for JPEG XS compression to facilitate low-latency encoding and decoding.

news.headline: RWS named ‘Official Creative Localization Partner’ at Canva Create 2025 in LA. 190 markets served. Design made accessible.
news.summary: Based in Maidenhead, England, RWS has been a trusted partner of Canva, the visual communication platform, since 2016. Next week at Canva Create 2025 in Los Angeles, RWS will be announced as the ‘Official Creative Localization Partner’. RWS has played a crucial role in Canva's mission to democratize design by offering translation and localization services to customers in 190 markets. This partnership showcases RWS's commitment to making Canva's suite of tools accessible globally.

news.headline: NATO’s Rutte: Allies started to ramp up defence spending after Trump came in as us president the first time.
SmartStream partners with Finastra to expand collateral management in MEA and APAC, aiding institutions with comprehensive solutions.
news.summary: A partnership has been formed between SmartStream and Finastra, global financial software providers, to enhance collateral management workflows in Treasury and Capital Markets, particularly targeting the MEA and APAC regions. This collaboration aims to offer an effective solution for financial institutions to streamline workflows and adhere to regulations by utilizing SmartStream’s comprehensive collateral management solution. The partnership is expected to accelerate processes for institutions in these regions.

news.headline: Stock futures down on Thursday with Acuity Inc. expected to report $1.03 billion revenue, RH reported $812.41 million Q4 revenue.
news.summary: Today, U.S. stock futures showed a downward trend as investors keep an eye on certain stocks, including Acuity Inc. (NYSE:AYI) and RH (NYSE:RH). Analysts anticipate Acuity to announce earnings of $3.70 per share with revenue hitting $1.03 billion before markets open. In after-hours trading, Acuity's shares dipped by 2% to $261.05. On the other hand, RH released its fourth-quarter financial results post-market on Wednesday, with revenue totaling $812.41 million, falling short of expectations. For a detailed account, visit a financial news platform.

VARTA introduces color-coded portfolio for low-voltage vehicle batteries, focusing on Advanced Batteries incl. Li-Ion. Simplifies selection process for wholesalers, workshops, and fleets.
news.summary: A new color-coded portfolio has been introduced to streamline the process of choosing low-voltage vehicle batteries for wholesalers, workshops, and fleets. This initiative aims to meet the increasing demand for Advanced Batteries that can deliver optimized performance to meet the requirements of modern vehicles. The introduction of Li-Ion batteries has further expanded the range of solutions available.

news.headline: ADAMA Ltd.'s new mollusc control ingredient Feralla® gains EU approval, marking a significant step with launch close. (Character count: 103)
news.summary: ADAMA Ltd., a top global crop protection company, has reached a significant milestone in the development of Feralla®-based products. On April 3, 2025, the company revealed that Feralla®, its newly acquired active ingredient, has secured approval for use in various products. ADAMA Ltd., listed on SZSE as 000553, made this announcement from Beijing and TEL AVIV, Israel. This achievement marks a major step forward towards introducing Feralla®-based solutions to the market.

news.headline: Canton Network and Flowdesk collaborate for on-chain margining solution for crypto derivatives, alongside Digital Asset and QCP.
news.summary: On April 3, 2025, in London, it was reported that Flowdesk has become a significant participant in the Canton Network's initiative to create an on-chain collateral and margin management system for bilateral derivatives. This development involves key players such as Digital Asset, QCP, along with other collaborators. Flowdesk's involvement highlights the increasing interest in this project, with a noteworthy impact on the industry's evolution.

news.headline: Padel Nuestro earns €58M in 2024, plans to boost turnover by 44%, leading global padel equipment distribution.
news.summary: In April 3, 2025, Pādel Nuestro, a company headquartered in Murcia, Spain, solidified its position as the top distributor of padel equipment across various channels worldwide. The company, which recorded a turnover of €58M in 2024, is now targeting a 44% increase in revenue for 2025, aiming to reach a total turnover of approximately €83.5M.

news.headline: ION Treasury launches Enterprise Payment Hub to centralize payment processing for corporations, financial institutions, and central banks.
news.summary: On April 3, 2025, ION Treasury, a leading global provider of treasury and risk management solutions for various entities, unveiled its latest innovation - the Enterprise Payment Hub. This new solution aims to streamline, automate, and enhance the security of payments for corporations, financial institutions, and central banks. By centralizing payment processes, the Enterprise Payment Hub is poised to revolutionize payment operations, catering to the needs of a diverse range of clients.

news.headline: Hornetsecurity to acquire Altospam, strengthening its position as a European cybersecurity leader.
news.summary: Hornetsecurity has revealed plans to strengthen its status as a top European cybersecurity specialist. Based in Lille, France, the company made the announcement on April 3, 2025. As a prominent worldwide supplier of advanced cloud security, compliance, backup, and security awareness tools, Hornetsecurity aims to enhance its market position.

news.headline: Notified and SWNS team up to expand business reach across UK, allowing clients to boost content on 65 media outlets.
news.summary: GlobeNewswire has announced that their clients can now enhance their content reach across a network of 65 media outlets. This expansion is expected to significantly increase the visibility of the clients' content to a wider audience.

Bitcoin aims for $71K amid US business gloom; tariffs hike could push price down. Analysts wary as Bitcoin mirrors turbulent 2022 scenario. Fed likely to pump more money into economy; BTC may surge.
news.summary: Bitcoin is facing conditions similar to the bear market bottom of 2022 as the US business sees a "very high risk" ahead. When President Trump announced worldwide reciprocal trade tariffs, Bitcoin fell up to 8.5% while the S&P 500 rose by 0.7%. The Philadelphia Fed's Business Outlook Survey is showing high uncertainty, comparable to 2000, 2008, and 2022. The key level to watch for Bitcoin is $91,000, with Capriole Investments suggesting that US macroeconomic moves will determine the technical trend. An increase in global liquidity could benefit crypto assets. The US Federal Reserve has started to loosen financial policy, possibly leading to a significant BTC price upside. The M2 money supply influx in the US could potentially trigger a BTC price rebound by May. This article does not offer investment advice, and readers are advised to conduct their own research before making any decisions.

news.headline: Raxio receives $100M from IFC to develop Sub-Saharan Africa data center platform, expand facilities for key technologies.
news.summary: In Washington, Raxio Group, a prominent data center platform in Sub-Saharan Africa, has secured a notable agreement for $100 million in financing from the International Finance Corporation (IFC), which is part of the World Bank Group. This funding injection is set to expedite Raxio's growth by enhancing their facilities that support vital technologies such as AI, cloud computing, and digital financial services. These technologies play a crucial role in driving Africa's economic advancement and promoting digital inclusivity. The debt funding provided by IFC will assist Raxio in doubling its current capacity, facilitating their expansion efforts.

Trump's 'Reciprocal Tariff' proposal, aiming to reduce America’s $1.2 trillion trade deficit, criticized for economic absurdity. White House faced skepticism over the figures shared on tariffs. Story details on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: President Donald Trump is taking steps to address America's annual trade deficit of $1.2 trillion, sparking concerns about the impact on the global economy. Observers on X have delved into the calculations behind the tariffs imposed by other countries on the US, leading to retaliatory tariffs being imposed by the US. James Surowiecki from The Atlantic and Fast Company questioned the credibility of the figures shared by the White House, particularly the method of calculating tariff rates based on the trade deficit divided by imports. The complexity of the situation is further outlined in the full article on Benzinga.com.

More employees managing expenses leading to rise of expense apps; Findity reports on expense management evolution across 10 markets in the latest report.
news.summary: In a recent report titled 'State of Expense Management Report 2025', Findity, a prominent expense management technology provider, analyzed the progression of expense management in ten global markets. The report includes analysis on Nordic countries such as Sweden, Norway, and Denmark. The findings present insights on trends and developments in expense management in various regions. This comprehensive report by Findity highlights the current state of expense management and provides valuable information on the industry's landscape.

Kanazawa University research uses high-speed imaging to study cell communication, pioneering nanoscopic profiling of sEVs.
news.summary: In Kanazawa, Japan, on April 3, 2025, the Nano Life Science Institute (WPI-NanoLSI) at Kanazawa University showcased a new method for examining small extracellular vesicles (sEVs) at a nanoscopic level. This cutting-edge technique involves utilizing high-speed atomic force microscopy (HS-AFM) videography to analyze the sEVs. This groundbreaking approach introduces an innovative way to study these microscopic structures.

Kanazawa University researchers utilize extracellular vesicles to enhance immune response in cancer treatment.
news.summary: In Kanazawa, Japan on April 3, 2025, a breakthrough in cancer treatment was announced by researchers at the Nano Life Science Institute (WPI-NanoLSI) affiliated with Kanazawa University. They, along with their colleagues, have introduced a novel method utilizing extracellular vesicles (EVs), which are minuscule, naturally existing particles. This development marks a significant advancement in the field of cancer treatment.

Pan Pacific Singapore offers transformative spaces for gatherings in Marina Bay. Known for gracious hospitality.
news.summary: On April 3, 2025, in Singapore's Marina Bay precinct and central business district, the prestigious Pan Pacific Singapore hotel stands out as a symbol of sophistication and excellent hospitality. It is a popular option for Meetings and Incentives due to its convenient location and exceptional service.

news.headline: Fangzhou's subsidiary, Fangyixing, designated as a 2024 National High-Tech Enterprise showing record growth.
news.summary: On April 3, 2025, Beijing Fangyixing Information Technology Co., Ltd., a subsidiary of China's top Internet healthcare solutions provider Fangzhou Inc. (06086.HK), received certification as a 2024 National High-Tech company. This underscores Fangzhou's commitment to innovation and advancing technological solutions in the healthcare sector.

Aker BP extends alliance with SLB and Stimwell Services for five more years to boost oil production.
news.summary: In Fornebu, Norway, on April 3, 2025, Aker BP announced an extension of their alliance agreement with SLB and Stimwell Services for an additional five years. The partnership aims to enhance oil production efficiency and output. This collaboration will see the entities working closely together to drive growth in the sector. Key individuals involved include Sami Haidar, Managing Director of Stimwell. This extended agreement underscores the commitment to achieving increased productivity in the oil industry.

news.headline: Wall Street analysts predict Lamb Weston Holdings Q3 earnings at 87 cents/share, higher than last year's $1.2/share. Quarterly revenue expected at $1.49 billion, up from $1.46 billion. Lamb Weston's stock gained 1.6% to close at $54.15.
news.summary: Eagle, Idaho-based company Lamb Weston Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:LW) is set to announce its third-quarter earnings on April 3. Analysts forecast earnings of 87 cents per share, a decrease from $1.2 per share last year. Quarterly revenue is expected to be $1.49 billion, up from $1.46 billion in the previous year. On March 20, Lamb Weston declared a quarterly dividend of 37 cents per share. The company's stock closed at $54.15, up 1.6% on Wednesday. For more details and analyst ratings, visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga.
